mapper.select: SELECT mc.*, c.coupon_name, c.coupon_type, c.discount_value, c.min_consumption FROM member_coupon mc LEFT JOIN coupon c ON mc.coupon_id = c.id WHERE mc.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY mc.receive_time DESC

SELECT mc.*, c.coupon_name, c.coupon_type, c.discount_value, c.min_consumption FROM member_coupon mc LEFT JOIN coupon c ON mc.coupon_id = c.id WHERE mc.member_id = #{memberId} AND mc.use_time IS NULL AND mc.expire_time > NOW() ORDER BY mc.expire_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_coupon WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND use_time IS NULL AND expire_time > NOW()
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO member_coupon (member_id, coupon_id, coupon_code, expire_time, created_time) VALUES
(#{item.memberId}, #{item.couponId}, #{item.couponCode}, #{item.expireTime}, NOW())
